full_text:
Ding Yuan (Jianyang) 丁原 (建陽)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Yuan (丁原), styledJianyang (建陽). An excellent horseman and archer, assassinated by Lü Bu on Dong Zhuo’s orders. Ding Yuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ding Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
